channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in TypeScript (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in TypeScript nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 🟦 nexu-io/open-design (49167 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: nexu-io

📝 Repository: nexu-io/open-design

📄 Descrizione: 🎨 Local-first, open-source Claude Design alternative. ⚡ 19 Skills · ✨ 71 brand-grade Design Systems 🖼 Generate web · desktop · mobile prototypes · slides · images · videos · HyperFrames 📦 Sandboxed preview · HTML/PDF/PPTX/MP4 export 🤖 Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.

⭐ Stelle: 49167

🍴 Forks: 5589

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: agent-skills ai-agents ai-design byok claude claude-code-for-design claude-design coding-agents design-systems design-tools desktop-app figma-alternative generative-ai hermes-agent local-first nextjs no-code prototyping ui-generator vibe-coding

📜 Licenza: Apache License 2.0

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-28T04:25:20Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-22T06:02:29Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 google-labs-code/design.md (12224 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: google-labs-code

📝 Repository: google-labs-code/design.md

📄 Descrizione: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

⭐ Stelle: 12224

🍴 Forks: 1093

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

item.title: 🟦 OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign (6000 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: OpenCoworkAI

📝 Repository: OpenCoworkAI/open-codesign

📄 Descrizione: Open-source Claude Design alternative. One-click import your Claude Code / Codex API key. Prompt → prototype / slides / PDF. Multi-model (Claude, GPT, Gemini, Kimi, GLM, Ollama). BYOK, local-first, MIT.

⭐ Stelle: 6000

🍴 Forks: 635

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-design anthropic byok claude claude-code claude-design claude-design-alternative deepseek design-to-code desktop-app electron figma-alternative gemini local-first multi-model ollama openai openrouter typescript ui-generator

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-18T03:14:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-17T04:57:54Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 🟦 YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-gpt-image-2 (5795 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: YouMind-OpenLab

📝 Repository: YouMind-OpenLab/awesome-gpt-image-2

📄 Descrizione: 🚀 World's largest GPT Image 2 prompt library, updated daily — 2000+ curated prompts with preview images, 16 languages. OpenAI's next-gen image model with pixel-perfect text rendering, cross-image consistency, and commercial-grade illustration. Free & open source.

⭐ Stelle: 5795

🍴 Forks: 518

💻 Linguaggio: TypeScript

🏷️ Topics: ai-image-generation ai-prompts awesome awesome-list commercial-illustration duct-tape gpt gpt-image gpt-image-2 image-generation multilingual openai openai-image prompt-engineering prompts text-rendering

📜 Licenza: Other

⏰ Creato il: 2026-04-16T13:57:42Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-05-15T05:46:05Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
